title: Configure overstory runtime capability mapping

title: Phase 2 Core Slimming: AI Provider SDK extraction

title: EventBus field diff enhancement for record.updated

closeReason: Merged: EventBus field diff with changedFields/before/after payload for record.created/updated/deleted events

title: Fix 3 failing tests + 2 errors in test suite
description: Current test suite: 3003 pass, 3 fail, 2 errors. Identify and fix the 3 failing tests. These may be related to AnomalyDetector or other stale references from core slimming Phase 1.

title: Fix canonicalBranch to feat/m2 + stash-and-merge blocked branches

Merge pending branches in order: builder-test-fix/linchkit-abb1, builder-core-slim/linchkit-2281, builder-cap-ai/linchkit-2281. 4. Run 'git stash pop' after merges.
closeReason: Merged: canonicalBranch fixed to feat/m2, 3 branches merged

title: Diagnose: database not connecting + schemas missing after M2 merges
description: User reports: 1) Database shows 'not connected' in UI admin panel despite DATABASE_URL in .env and PostgreSQL running in Docker. 2) System menus and schemas are missing. Steps: check .env DATABASE_URL value, verify Docker postgres is reachable, run linch dev and capture full console output, check if schemas register properly. May need bun install first for new cap-ai-provider workspace link.
closeReason: Resolved: bun install needed after cap-ai-provider merge. DB and schemas working.

title: Commit cherry-picked allowlist changes + resolve pending merges
description: Cherry-pick of 4ea6780 already applied and staged (.claude/settings.json with ov/sd/ml/mulch allowlist). Just needs: git commit -m 'feat: add ov/sd/ml/mulch to Claude Code allowlist'. Then close linchkit-238a.
closeReason: Committed allowlist changes adding ov/sd/ml/mulch to .claude/settings.json

title: Implement multi-agent review pipeline (Gemini + Codex + Claude)
description: Add automated code review gate before merge_ready. Large changes (>5 files or >200 lines): Claude Code reviewer + Gemini CLI + Codex CLI triple review. Small changes: Gemini + Claude dual review. Modify lead agent-def and/or add OV hooks to invoke gemini/codex CLIs on git diff before merge_ready. Add review results to merge_ready mail.
closeReason: Merged: multi-agent review pipeline (Gemini + Codex dual/triple review gate)

title: Research: Lazy Gate integration with Overstory
description: Investigate Lazy Gate (quality gate / review tool). Research: what is Lazy Gate, what does it do, how could it integrate with the Overstory agent workflow. Evaluate if it can replace or complement the multi-agent review pipeline (Gemini+Codex+Claude). Report findings and feasibility.

title: Research: cap-permission API design for cross-capability usage
description: Permission is now a capability (cap-permission). Other capabilities need to set permissions on their buttons/actions. Research current cap-permission API: How does a capability declare permission requirements for its actions? How does UI read permission state to show/hide buttons? Is the developer experience clear enough? Propose improvements if needed. Check: packages/core/src/types/ for permission types, capabilities/cap-permission/, CommandLayer permission slot.

title: Chatter capability MVP (Spec 53 — message + field change audit)
description: Implement Chatter as a capability (NOT core). Spec 53 MVP scope: 1) Message timeline per record (create/read messages). 2) Auto-audit entries from EventBus record.updated changedFields (now available after EventBus diff merge). 3) GraphQL subscription for real-time updates. 4) Basic UI component (timeline view). File areas: capabilities/cap-chatter/ (new). Depends on: EventBus field diff (merged), GraphQL subscriptions (existing).
closeReason: Merged: Chatter MVP (backend + UI) — cap-chatter package with messages, auto-audit, GraphQL, ChatterPanel

title: Table column resizing (TanStack Table)
description: Add column resizing to AutoList table. Use TanStack Table built-in column resizing API (enableColumnResizing, columnResizeMode). Persist widths to localStorage. File areas: capabilities/cap-adapter-ui-react/src/components/auto-list/
closeReason: Merged: table column resizing with localStorage persistence

title: Field dependencies: visibleWhen conditional form rendering
description: Spec 54 section 1. Add visibleWhen property to ViewFieldConfig for conditional field visibility in forms. E.g. show 'urgent_reason' only when priority=high. Type addition in packages/core/src/types/view.ts + rendering logic in cap-adapter-ui-react AutoForm. Small, self-contained feature.
closeReason: Already implemented: visibleWhen fully exists on base branch

title: Saved filters / custom views persistence

closeReason: Implemented saved filter presets for AutoList: useSavedViews hook (localStorage), SavedViewTabs component (tab strip with create/rename/delete), ListView integration, schema-list.tsx wiring. 14 dedicated tests + 200 total passing.

title: UI diagnosis: system menus missing + possible InMemoryStore fallback
description: User reports UI shows no system menus/schemas despite linch dev log showing 3 schemas loaded and PostgreSQL connected. Use Chrome DevTools MCP to inspect: 1) Check /api/schemas response. 2) Check /graphql introspection. 3) Check UI navigation/sidebar for schema links. 4) Check network requests for errors. 5) Check if data persists (create a record, refresh, see if it survives — if not, InMemoryStore). Server is running on localhost:3001 (API) and localhost:3000 (UI).
closeReason: Merged: fix fetchAppConfig cache bug causing missing system menus

title: Fix lint + typecheck errors from chatter merge
description: builder-force-merge reports: 10 lint errors in merged chatter files + 52 pre-existing typecheck errors. Run bun run check and bun run typecheck, fix all errors. Focus on cap-chatter/ files first (new), then any pre-existing issues.

title: Fix table column resize: not responding + table not full width
description: User reports: 1) Table is not stretching to full container width. 2) Column drag resize handles not responding / no visual feedback. Check auto-list.tsx column resize implementation. May need: enableColumnResizing=true, columnResizeMode=onChange, proper CSS for resize handles, table layout=fixed or width=100%. Use Chrome DevTools to inspect.
closeReason: Fixed table full width (width:100%/minWidth:getTotalSize()) and column resize handles (removed th overflow-hidden, widened hit area w-4, columnResizeMode:onChange)

title: Architecture audit: identify ugly patterns + missing implementations
description: Scan codebase for: 1) Ugly architecture patterns (tight coupling, god files, circular deps, TODOs, FIXMEs, hacky workarounds). 2) Stub/placeholder implementations (functions that throw not-implemented or return empty). 3) Missing error handling at system boundaries. 4) Dead code / unused exports. Focus on packages/core/ and capabilities/. Report findings as actionable list.
closeReason: Architecture audit complete. Found: 14 god files (>500 lines), dead EventHandlerContext interface stubs, 1 deep sub-path import. Fixed: slimmed EventHandlerContext (removed dead execute/get/query), fixed config-loader deep import. No circular deps, no tight coupling, clean module boundaries. Recommended follow-ups: split derived-property.ts, build-schema.ts, mcp-server.ts.

title: Test coverage gaps: identify untested paths + add E2E tests
description: Analyze test coverage: 1) Which core modules have low test coverage? 2) Which capabilities lack tests entirely? 3) Add E2E integration tests for key user flows: create schema record, edit, delete, state transition, search/filter, GraphQL subscription. 4) Add missing unit tests for edge cases. Current: 3086 pass. Target: fill coverage gaps.
closeReason: Added 6 test files (96 tests): E2E approval workflow, event delivery, command pipeline (core), plus CostEstimator, AIResponseCache, createAIService tests (cap-ai-provider). All 3187 tests pass.
